access_entry_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EKS access entry, which uniquely identifies it.

created_at.description: The date and time when the EKS access entry was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the EKS access entry.

kubernetes_groups.description: A set of Kubernetes groups associated with the EKS access entry.

modified_at.description: The date and time when the EKS access entry was last modified.

tags_all.description: A map of tags assigned to the EKS access entry, providing metadata information.

user_name.description: The name of the user associated with the EKS access entry.
